kits.name: Flutter Feedback Kit
kits.description: In-app user feedback for Flutter — form widget, voice input, offline queue, screenshot capture, pluggable backends.

kits.name: Flutter Quiz Kit
kits.description: Quiz engine for Flutter — question generation, adaptive difficulty, sound feedback, STT matching.

kits.name: Flutter Tutorial Kit
kits.description: In-app step-by-step tutorial overlay for Flutter — coach mark walkthrough powered by Riverpod.

kits.name: Flutter Offline Sync
kits.description: Generic offline-first bidirectional sync for Flutter — local-wins conflict resolution, Firestore-agnostic abstract interfaces.

kits.name: Flutter Import Export Kit
kits.description: CSV and Anki TSV import/export for Flutter apps — auto-format detection, quoted-field CSV parser.

kits.name: Flutter Gamification System
kits.description: Gamification engine for Flutter — XP, levels, streaks, badges, achievements, SRS rating.
